name: ADC Facility Water System (chillers & heat rejection)
source_documents: products/FWS/FWS-COOL-001_Rev0_2.md (Rev 0.2, 2026-06-11, issued for review — the zero-water site option per decision 0006; CDU basis = 4x ADC CDU)
products/FWS/FWS-RFQ-M-001_Rev0_2.md (Rev 0.2, 2026-06-11, hold lifted by decision 0006 — issue at Scott's discretion per site architecture selection)
telemetry_domain: D4 Thermal (chillers/fluid coolers/PHE → plant controller, BACnet-IP/Modbus → MGN-TEL-001)

parameters.value: 5 MW IT node / 10 MW MGN-BOD-002 microgrid, Lafayette LA (ASHRAE 2A)

BOTH retained, site-selectable (decision 0006, Scott 2026-06-11): evaporative W32/W40 + 15-25% chiller trim (NSTAR PUE basis, best PUE, consumes water) OR zero-water dry-cooler + chiller plant (FWS-COOL-001, water-constrained sites). Per-site choice driven by water availability/permitting

4x ADC CDU (OCP Deschutes basis, 2 MW / 500 GPM, ADC-CDU-DES-BOM-001), one per 16-rack reference cluster; the non-lineup 2.5 MW CDU model in the Rev 0.1 drop was purged system-wide per decision 0006 — never reference it
FWS-RFQ-M-001 Rev 0.2 hold lifted (decision 0006); re-check quantities against FWS-COOL-001 M-5 block-load reconciliation before issue
